name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident a8d14e34-9f9b-41fe-8e5e-10b356fa5af9
description:
Okay, here’s a three-point analysis of the security alert:

1.  **SUMMARY:** A user attempting to exfiltrate sensitive data from a network connected to a compromised server (192.168.1.35) has been detected.

2.  **TECHNIQUE:** T1059 - Command Execution – The attacker is attempting to execute a command on the compromised system.

3.  **ACTION:** IMMEDIATELY isolate the source IP address 192.168.1.35 to prevent further data leakage.

action--1.name: Alert Ingestion
action--1.description: System received new raw SIEM log
